name: cabaret-vscode
description: Cabaret's review pages as read-only text buffers in VS Code

colors.description: Background of an added line in a Cabaret diff
Background of a removed line in a Cabaret diff
Background of the changed words within an added line in a Cabaret diff
Background of the changed words within a removed line in a Cabaret diff
Background of a hunk header line in a Cabaret diff
Left border of a conflict line carried only by the reviewed diff
Left border of a conflict line carried only by the current diff
